snippet.title: DA BRAVO! Podcast #14 cu Mihai Rait Dragomir
snippet.description:
рЯФ• DA BRAVO! Podcast #14 cu Mihai Rait Dragomir ( Dorel ) I Mihai Bobonete podcast
рЯСЙ Subscribe sau aboneaza-te pentru mai mult: https://goo.gl/9gN6Yd
....
рЯПЮпЄП "Fiind bƒГiet pƒГduri cutreieram
≈Юi mƒГ culcam ades l√ҐngƒГ izvor,
Iar bra≈£ul drept sub cap eu mi-l puneam
S-aud cum apa sunƒГ-nceti≈Яor:
Un freamƒГt lin trecea din ram √Ѓn ram
≈Юi un miros venea adormitor.
Astfel ades eu nop≈£i √Ѓntregi am mas,
Bl√Ґnd √Ѓng√Ґnat de-al valurilor glas." 

рЯПЦпЄП Departe de noi si copilaria noastra, nu a dat-o Mihai Eminescu, caci si eu si Mihai am adormit adesea pe malul Dunarii cu bratul sub cap si cate si mai cate n-am facut pe malul acesta plin de viata si de copilarie.

рЯ¶Д In acest episod veti auzi si veti vedea un alt Mihai Rait , nu e Dorel, nu e baiatul de la stand up sau improvizatie, nu e vreo vedeta autohtona, nu...astazi veti vedea doi copii care alearga pe un inorog printre sutele de amintiri frumoase ale adolescentei traite impreuna.

рЯНТ Un fel de "Cire»Щarii", un fel de "Coliba Unchiului Tom" , un fel de "Ciulinii Baraganului" , un fel de Robin Hood si putin din "Via»Ыa la »Ыara", ce sa mai...serviti cu incredere ca eu atata energie buna n-am mai intalinit pe nicaieri.
....

рЯСЙ  Madalina Lazar: 0722329263 
....

рЯПЦпЄП Departe de noi si copilaria noastra, nu a dat-o Mihai Eminescu, caci si eu si Mihai am adormit adesea pe malul Dunarii cu bratul sub cap si cate si mai cate n-am facut pe malul acesta plin de viata si de copilarie.

Nu Uita Sa Apesi рЯФФ

Catalin Rotaru 0723 591 595
catalin.rotaru@rocamusic.ro

Versuri вАЬDiamante »Щi CerceiвАЭ :

E 4 dimineata si tot as mai sta
Nu ma satur sa te privesc iubirea mea
Parfumul tau m-a innebunit,m-a rascolit
M-am lasat purtat de val si m-ai vrajit

Du-ma la tine sau vino la mine
Facem cum vrei tu sa fie bine
Frumoasa mea
De ce vrei sa ma lasi din nou sa ma gandesc la tine 
Toata noaptea

Iti place filmul sa fi high
Ai vrea sa mai stai
Sa mai facem inca un pai
Te-ai incalzit ca luna mai
Ce o sa faci acum cu sansa pe care o ai

Stiu ca vrei sa pozezi in inger dar esti demon
Si cel mai mult imi place baby ca te seman
Se vede pe tine cum arzi de nerabdare
In mintea ta acum ti-ai da-o cel mai tare

Imbracata toata in rosu ca-i place Ferrari
Diamante la gat si cercei de la Bvlgari
Are pielea fina,creola ca ciocolata
Ea fata,ea e fata care m-a dat gata

Imbracata toata in rosu ca-i place Ferrari
Diamante la gat si cercei de la Bvlgari
Are pielea fina,creola ca ciocolata
Ea fata,ea e fata care m-a dat gata

Mi-ai pus foc in vene cu prezenta ta provocatoare
M-ai facut sa uit tot M-am prins in vrajile tale
Si nu pot sa mai respir aer daca nu esti tu
Langa mine sa-ti simt pielea si parfumul


Ca mine nu e niciunul si tu stii asta bine
Atunci cand ai nevoie poti sa te bazezi pe mine
Pentru ca stiu baby sa pastrez un secret
Cand esti langa mine e totul perfect

snippet.title: Prima tabƒГrƒГ pentru copiii din Ferentari
snippet.description:
Sunt deja 11 ani de c√Ґnd Valeriu Nicolae √ЃncearcƒГ sƒГ le ofere o »ЩansƒГ la educa»Ыie copiilor din familiile defavorizate din Ferentari. A √Ѓnceput cu activitƒГ»Ыi de week-end organizate la »Шcoala 136, unde voluntarii le ofereau copiilor medita»Ыii. Apoi a cumpƒГrat o casƒГ »Щi, pe l√ҐngƒГ medita»Ыii, a adƒГugat »Щedin»Ыe de consiliere »Щi suport emo»Ыional. √Оn timp, la Casa BunƒГ вАУ a»Щa cum au numit-o copiii вАУ s-a format o comunitate »Щi, √Ѓncep√Ґnd din aceastƒГ primƒГvarƒГ, Valeriu Nicolae organizeazƒГ tabere de o sƒГptƒГm√ҐnƒГ. P√ҐnƒГ la toamnƒГ vor fi √Ѓn total zece tabere, √Ѓn care vor ajunge 60 de copii.

Aici, ei urmeazƒГ un program g√Ґndit special pentru ei: studiazƒГ, fac sport »Щi se joacƒГ √ЃmpreunƒГ. TabƒГra are un program zilnic √Ѓn care, pe l√ҐngƒГ activitƒГ»Ыile distractive, copiii participƒГ √ЃmpreunƒГ cu voluntarii la treburile zilnice ale casei. GƒГtesc, pun masa, fac curƒГ»Ыenie »Щi √Ѓnva»ЫƒГ sƒГ colaboreze »Щi sƒГ se ajute unii pe al»Ыii. вАЮEu mƒГ ghidez dupƒГ o chestie a lui Aristotel, care spunea cƒГ nu suntem ceea ce suntem, suntem ceea ce facem. »Шi dacƒГ ai rutine de excelen»ЫƒГ atunci devii excelent,вАЭ spune Valeriu Nicolae.

Am participat la prima tabƒГrƒГ organizatƒГ de Casa BunƒГ »Щi am putut vedea c√Ґt de repede se adapteazƒГ copiii la aceastƒГ rutinƒГ √Ѓn care sunt √ЃnvƒГ»Ыa»Ыi sƒГ viseze »Щi sƒГ aibƒГ √Ѓncredere √Ѓn ei.

---

Acest material a fost realizat cu sprijinul Jysk Rom√Ґnia, care a ini»Ыiat »Щi organizat taberele de la Casa BunƒГ.

#ContinutSponsorizat

P√ҐnƒГ la toamnƒГ vor fi √Ѓn total zece tabere, √Ѓn care vor ajunge 60 de copii.

Aici, ei urmeazƒГ un program g√Ґndit special pentru ei: studiazƒГ, fac sport »Щi se joacƒГ √ЃmpreunƒГ. TabƒГra are un program zilnic √Ѓn care, pe l√ҐngƒГ activitƒГ»Ыile distractive, copiii participƒГ √ЃmpreunƒГ cu voluntarii la treburile zilnice ale casei. GƒГtesc, pun masa, fac curƒГ»Ыenie »Щi √Ѓnva»ЫƒГ sƒГ colaboreze »Щi sƒГ se ajute unii pe al»Ыii. вАЮEu mƒГ ghidez dupƒГ o chestie a lui Aristotel, care spunea cƒГ nu suntem ceea ce suntem, suntem ceea ce facem. »Шi dacƒГ ai rutine de excelen»ЫƒГ atunci devii excelent,вАЭ spune Valeriu Nicolae.

Am participat la prima tabƒГrƒГ organizatƒГ de Casa BunƒГ »Щi am putut vedea c√Ґt de repede se adapteazƒГ copiii la aceastƒГ rutinƒГ √Ѓn care sunt √ЃnvƒГ»Ыa»Ыi sƒГ viseze »Щi sƒГ aibƒГ √Ѓncredere √Ѓn ei.

---

Acest material a fost realizat cu sprijinul Jysk Rom√Ґnia, care a ini»Ыiat »Щi organizat taberele de la Casa BunƒГ.

snippet.description:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)

I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Versuri:

Esti o bucata cazuta din rai,
Esti o minune, doar tu poti sa-mi dai, 
Din lumea ta o parte,
Sapte zile din sapte.
Rochie alba, sangria-n pahar,
Gura ta dulce ispita mi-e iar.
Ochii diamante,
Tu ma ghidezi in noapte.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande,
Lipeste ma de inima ta.
Fericire-n secunde,
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Am lasat in urma noastra orasul gol.
Ne-am inchis in lumea noastra in dormitor,
Siluete la fereastra intr-un dans nocturn,
Tu esti noaptea mea albastra,
Esti tot ce am mai bun.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande 
Lipeste ma de inima ta
Fericire-n secunde
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.
Mai bine stinge-ma cu un sarut.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.
Mai bine stinge-ma cu un sarut.

Refren: 

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,

Jumatatea mea mai buna.

DonвАЩt wanna lie, I donвАЩt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвАЩll see the sun 

IвАЩd rather run away
DonвАЩt wanna lie, I donвАЩt want a life
Send me a gun
And IвАЩll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But itвАЩs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who threw dirt on your name 

Since ten, I been feeling lonely
Had friends but they was picking on me
Always thinking why my lips so big?
Was I too dark? Can they sense my fears?

These gay thoughts would always haunt me
I prayed God would take it from me
ItвАЩs hard for you when youвАЩre fighting
And nobody knows it when youвАЩre silent 

IвАЩd be by the phone
Stanning Nicki morning into dawn
Only place I felt like I belonged
Strangers make you feel so loved, you know? 

And IвАЩm happy by the way
That I made that jump, that leap of faith
IвАЩm happy that it all worked out for me
Imma make my fans so proud of me, (ohhhh)

#AnneMarie #NiallHoran #OurSong

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UKвАЩs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-MвАЩs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, вАШSpeak Your MindвАЩ which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UKвАЩs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

Ў≥ўДЎІўЕ Ў®ўЗ ўЗўЕўЗ ЎМ Ў≥ўДЎІўЕ ЎМ ЎІўЕџМЎѓўИЎІЎ±ўЕ ўЗўЕўЗ ЎіўЕЎІ ЎЃўИЎ® Ў®ЎІЎіџМЎѓ

snippet.title: BTS "Butter" - The Late Show with Stephen Colbert
snippet.description:
Global pop icons BTS return to perform their record-smashing new hit, "Butter," ahead of their upcoming livestream event BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO which takes place on June 13th and 14th. If you missed it, scroll back to watch RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook teach Stephen Colbert some new hand gestures in a hilarious Late Show comedy bit! #BTSonLSSC #Butter #BTS

Subscribe To "The Late Show" Channel: http://bit.ly/ColbertYouTube

---
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert is the premier late night talk show on CBS, airing at 11:35pm EST, streaming online via Paramount+, and delivered to the International Space Station on a USB drive taped to a weather balloon. Every night, viewers can expect: Comedy, humor, funny moments, witty interviews, celebrities, famous people, movie stars, bits, humorous celebrities doing bits, funny celebs, big group photos of every star from Hollywood, even the reclusive ones, plus also jokes.

snippet.title: What Are You Doing With Your Life? The Tail End
snippet.description:
Gain a new perspective on your life with our "Calendar & Timeline of Your Life Posters":
https://kgs.link/N3Ksfqvp

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sources-tailend/

Wrapping your mind around your life is pretty hard, because you are up to your neck in it. It's like trying to understand the ocean while learning how to swim. On most days you are busy just keeping your head above water. So it is not easy to figure out what to do with your life and how to spend your time.

There are a million distractions. Your family, friends and romantic partners, boring work, and exciting projects. Video games to play and books to read. And then there is your couch that somebody needs to lie on. ItвАЩs easy to get lost. So let us take a step back and take a look at your life from the outside.

VERSURI

Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama

Nu iesim din dormitor, 
Nici in noapte, nici in zori
Ne privesc, ar vrea sa se termine
Vor si ele sa faca ce faci tu cu mine
Dar mai bine imi convine 
Sa rupa toate hainele de pe mine


Ochi straini ce m-ar gusta 
Mie imi place aroma ta


Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama
Cand isi misca formele, 
O vorbesc de rau si fostele
Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana

Mainile pe solduri, urechile pe-acorduri
Nu furam, Tibi, draga, ca ne fura somnul
Da-i Cuba cu lemon, imi zice sa sunt champion
Vocea ei sigur o sa mi-o pun ca ringtone
Ce beton ne miscam pe reggaeton
Suntem in sincron parca legati cu cordon
Cine mai doarme la noapte
Cand e treaz fiecare hormon


Ochi straini ce m-ar gusta
Mie imi place aroma ta


Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana
Sa ma feresc, sa fug de tine mi-a zis si mama
Cand isi misca formele,
O vorbesc de rau si fostele
Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la Dominicana

Dominicana

Pielea ta ma duce cu gandul la ea

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT

snippet.title: DA BRAVO! Podcast #12 cu Dani O»Ыil
snippet.description:
DA BRAVO! Podcast #12 cu Dani O»Ыil I Mihai Bobonete podcast
рЯСЙ Subscribe sau aboneaza-te pentru mai mult: https://goo.gl/9gN6Yd

рЯФ• 06:30 povestea semnelor din frunte, coltul din dreapta sus
рЯФ• 10:04 a baut din biberon pana la 6 ani si adormea doar daca se juca la urechea mamei. De la 12 ani a dormit cu frate-suвАЩ si a renuntat la gestul cu urechea
рЯФ• 12:25 continua povestea inceputa de Razvan: cum am stricat bara de streptease. Zice ca si Loredana are in sufragerie 
рЯФ• 13:15 ce ar face daca ar fi pentru o zi presedinte
рЯФ• 16:44 poveste cu Mihaela Radulescu in Mikonos, dar mai poveste cu maseorul Romario. Babaiatule, n-ai auzit asa ceva вА¶
рЯФ• 25:00 cum a ajuns Sergiu Nicolaescu in platou la Neatza, el fiind invitat la TVR 
рЯФ• 29:35 despre calitatile lui Razvan
рЯФ• 33:15 continuarea povestii mele cu vaca Fulga si paralela cu Daniela Crudu vs Mickey Mouse
рЯФ• 34:45 care ar fi ultima masa daca ar muri maine. Ar vrea sa-i cante Vali Vijelie: Nevasta te-as intreba!
рЯФ• 42:02 intrebarea lui Magi Robert Tudor рЯШВ
рЯФ• 45:30 a stat in bloc cu Alina Plugaru. Dilema вА¶
рЯФ• 48:08 despre labagiul de la Radio Vest Timisoara. Zice ca sexul poate fi programat
рЯФ• 51:38 Povestea de senzatie cu Roxanuta. N-ati auzit pana acum asa ceva  вА¶ рЯШВрЯШВрЯШВ
рЯФ• 01:06:10 Ce gen de tata va fi. De ce si-a poreclit baiatul C√Ґrcel
рЯФ• 01:13:13 Produce spoturi. Care este cel mai interesant proiect al lui
рЯФ• 01:15:40 Intrebarile rapide: ai vazut ce craci are Simona Halep in rochie?
рЯФ• 01:17:05 Jucaria
рЯФ• 01:19:04 Ce a scris pe masa la final

....
Contact management & booking:
рЯСЙ  Madalina Lazar: 0722329263 
....
Urmareste-ma si pe:
рЯСЙFacebook: https://www.facebook.com/bobonetevirtualu/
рЯСЙInstagram: https://www.instagram.com/mihai.bobonete/
рЯСЙSite: http://www.mihaibobonete.ro
рЯСЙTwitter: https://twitter.com/bobonete
Pagini oficiale Da Bravo!
рЯСЙInstagram: https://www.instagram.com/dabravo.official/
рЯСЙFacebook:  https://www.facebook.com/da.bravo.bobonete
.....
A/V:  WorkHorse 
https://www.instagram.com/workhorse.ro
DP: Dan Petru
Second Camera: Bogdan Trestianu
Director: Florin Ivan

MCN YouTube: BrandTube - office@brandtube.ro

Este vorba de omul de afaceri Simon Maurer care a inventat sistemul de camerƒГ inteligentƒГ, este un patron de milioane, iar acum pleacƒГ √Ѓn concediu cu angaja»Ыii, pe banii lui.

snippet.description:

Health officials in Gaza said 28 Palestinians, including nine children, had been killed in Israeli airstrikes.

snippet.description:
https://beprogressive.ro/products/trambulina-progressive
Actori: Mircea Popa, Mihaela Ceaicovschi, Lenu»Ыa Moldovan
Regie: Cristi Ili»Щuan
Imagine: Tudor PƒГsat

Pentru colaborƒГri, promovƒГri, booking sau premii, a»Щtept mesajele voastre aici: office@mirceabravo.ro 

Vreau sƒГ mƒГ »Щi prezint pu»Ыin (pentru cei care sunte»Ыi curio»Щi). Sunt Mircea Bravo »Щi acest clip este realizat cu ajutorul echipei mele (scenari»Щti, cameramani, oameni pe regie, actori, oameni la montaj). Ne dƒГm cu to»Ыii silin»Ыa sƒГ creƒГm cel mai bun con»Ыinut pentru voi »Щi sƒГ fim de fiecare datƒГ originali √Ѓn idei »Щi execu»Ыie. Cine vine cu o idee copiatƒГ este exclus din echipƒГ. Glumesc. Doar √Ѓl batem p√ҐnƒГ se jurƒГ cƒГ nu mai furƒГ. 


Am √Ѓnceput √Ѓn 2014 cu diverse videouri cu camera ascunsƒГ (a»Щa-zisele farse). Am fost prin toatƒГ »Ыara, am filmat √Ѓn Cluj-Napoca, Bucure»Щti, Timi»Щoara, Constan»Ыa, Ia»Щi, T√Ґrgu-Mure»Щ, Alba-Iulia, ZalƒГu, Bistri»Ыa, √Ѓn principiu peste tot. DupƒГ un an, lumea a √Ѓnceput sƒГ mƒГ recunoascƒГ »Щi nu mai puteam face farse. Pentru mine a fost un moment greu. Dar colegului meu, Cristian, i-a venit ideea sƒГ filmƒГm cu camera la vedere, sub forma unui reportaj, transform√Ґnd astfel dezavantajul notorietƒГ»Ыii √Ѓntr-un avantaj. Astfel, am √Ѓnceput sƒГ cƒГlƒГtorim »Щi sƒГ filmƒГm prin lume (Marea Britanie, Fran»Ыa, Spania, Belgia, Rusia, Austria etc.). De la information + entertainment. »Шtiu cƒГ v-a»Ыi prins oricum din prima. Prin aceste reportaje am prezentat tot felul de evenimente, destina»Ыii, festivaluri, lucruri interesante. 


√Оn 2016 am hotƒГr√Ґt sƒГ facem √ЃncƒГ un pas. A»Щa au apƒГrut primele noastre scheciuri. Mici filme la care era nevoie de cameramani, actori, scenariu scris dinainte, tot felul. Ca orice lucru de care ne-am apucat, evident cƒГ »Щi la scheciuri am vrut sƒГ fim cei mai buni »Щi sƒГ vƒГ oferim calitate. Ne-am extins echipa, am adus cel mai bun cameraman, cel mai bun sunetist. SƒГ fie o plƒГcere sƒГ vƒГ uita»Ыi la videouri. »Шti»Ыi c√Ґnd vƒГ zg√Ґrie la urechi sunetul la anumite scheciuri? Noi am zis cƒГ nu vƒГ putem face asta. Mai apoi am adus √Ѓn echipƒГ oameni care sƒГ se ocupe de scenarii, oameni pe idei. »Шi cu idei. Pentru cƒГ ar fi imposibil ca un singur om sƒГ aibƒГ √Ѓn fiecare sƒГptƒГm√ҐnƒГ o idee tare de video. Eu a»Щa zic. 

Sunt sigur cƒГ nu toate videourile vƒГ plac. Nu-i nimic, nu vƒГ √Ѓntrista»Ыi, e normal. Unele se adreseazƒГ tinerilor sub 20 de ani, altele celor peste 30. Tot tineri »Щi ei. Dar vreau sƒГ vƒГ asigur cƒГ fiecare video e creat ca sƒГ vƒГ facƒГ sƒГ r√Ґde»Ыi. 


VƒГ mul»Ыumim cƒГ ne urmƒГri»Ыi »Щi, dupƒГ cum »Щti»Ыi deja, pute»Ыi sƒГ ne sus»Ыine»Ыi prin like, comment, share, subscribe, follow, stalking etc. DacƒГ le face»Ыi mƒГcar pe primele trei, hai patru, sunte»Ыi fani categoria I.

snippet.title: Journalist reports live from Gaza as neighbouring building hit by Israel airstrike
snippet.description:
An Israeli airstrike struck a high-rise building in central Gaza City as journalist Youmna Al Sayed reported live for Al Jazeera from a neighbouring building. Al Sayed continued to provide commentary despite being forced to move away from the camera by the explosions. The targeted building housed businesses in addition to offices for Hamas' Al-Aqsa satellite channel and is located in one of the busiest streets of Gaza's Roman neighbourhood. The airstrike is part of continued violence between Israel and Palestinian militants that is the most serious conflict between the parties since 2014 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube вЦЇ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Hamas sends rockets deeper into Israel after Gaza airstrikes as crisis spirals¬†вЦЇ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/may/13/israel-gaza-airstrikes-rockets-hamas

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a¬†Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as¬†the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

The strike on Jala Tower came as¬†the militant group Hamas intensified rocket fire from the besieged enclave towards Tel Aviv¬†after a night in which Israeli air strikes killed¬†at least 10 members of one family in a Gaza refugee camp, the deadliest strike since hostilities erupted earlier this week.

Read more: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/05/15/death-toll-rises-violence-rocks-gaza-israel-west-bank/
